pain.heading: You know
pain.subheading: Maintaining a WinDev legacy is expensive, risky, and unsustainable. You are not alone.
pain.desc1: Large teams maintaining code that no one fully masters. Budgets that only keep growing.
pain.desc2: Finding WinDev developers is increasingly difficult. The market is drying up.
pain.desc3: Trapped in an ecosystem with no evolution. No access to new technologies and modern integrations.
pain.desc4: Knowledge exists only in the heads of a few specialists — the "technology heroes."
pain.desc5: Migration projects that blow the budget, miss deadlines, or are abandoned entirely.
how.heading: How It
how.subheading: A 4-step pipeline that transforms your legacy into modern code with guaranteed quality.
how.step1Desc: Import your complete WinDev/WebDev project: flattened code (ZIP), documentation PDFs, SQL DDL, and Stored Procedures.
how.step2Desc: An intelligent knowledge base is automatically built, creating the cognitive twin of your legacy.
how.step3Desc: Specialized agents generate modern code using 61 MCP tools and the full context of the Knowledge Base.
how.step4Desc: Layered deterministic validation ensures every business rule is preserved during conversion.
roi.heading: Unmatched
roi.subheading: Real numbers. Measurable savings. Results that transform your business.
roi.disclaimer: * Conservative commercial positioning: 10x. In practice, the tool delivers up to 42x real productivity gain.
benefits.heading: Beyond
benefits.subheading: WXCode doesn't just convert code. It transforms your legacy knowledge into a strategic asset.
benefits.desc1: Eliminate dependency on "technology heroes." The KB automatically extracts business rules, and anyone can query them via the RAG agent.
benefits.desc2: The KB documents a legacy that never had documentation. Business rules, workflows, diagrams, and conversion notes — all organized and searchable.
benefits.desc3: Deterministic tests, milestone-based verification, and auditable governance. Conscious decisions about technical debt, not surprises.
benefits.desc4: Freedom to choose your stack without lock-in. Team focused on innovation, not legacy maintenance.
benefits.desc5: Modern stacks attract and retain top professionals. Leave behind the struggle of hiring WinDev specialists.
benefits.desc6: Each converted screen enriches the KB and accelerates the next. Bottom-up methodology with dependencies resolved progressively.
transparency.heading: Technical
transparency.subheading: No competitor openly discusses the challenges of AI. We do — and we show how we solve each one.
transparency.desc1: LLMs can generate the same information with different names.
transparency.desc2: Limited context windows for large projects.
transparency.desc3: Each execution can produce different results.
transparency.solution3: KB as source of truth + stabilization via MCP.
transparency.resultText: Controlled output, validated by deterministic tests and milestone-based verification. Probabilistic AI with
platform.subheading: WXCode industrializes legacy modernization with method, speed, governance, and continuous value delivery.
platform.pillar1Desc: Product-based modernization factory with manageable environments and delivery by business milestones.
platform.pillar2Desc: Conversion orchestrator with structured methodology, automation with governance, and quality checkpoints.
platform.pillar3Desc: Executive observability with progress dashboards and clear communication for leadership.
platform.pillar4Desc: Resumable after interruptions, replanning without losing history, and sustainable delivery cadence.
pricing.subheading: No promise replaces seeing the results with your own eyes. That's why we offer a 30-day PoC with your real project — no commitment required.
pricing.step1Desc: We select a representative sample of your legacy and run the full conversion — with the same quality as the final project.
pricing.step2Desc: Access the cockpit with progress dashboards, generated KB, extracted business rules, and converted code in real time.
pricing.step3Desc: At the end, you receive a complete report: working code, automated tests, partial KB, and real ROI metrics from your scenario.
pricing.step4Desc: If the results speak for themselves, we move forward together. If not, you keep all the generated knowledge. No contract, no commitment.
pricing.include1: Real sample conversion from your project
pricing.includedSubtitle: Everything you need to evaluate WXCode with confidence.
pricing.ctaSublabel: with your real project, no commitment
pricing.ctaDisclaimer: No contract. No credit card. No fine print.
contact.heading: Ready to
contact.subheading: Fill in your details and then answer a few quick questions so we can prepare a personalized analysis for your scenario.
contact.notice: By continuing, you will be directed to a brief qualification questionnaire.
questionnaire.headerSubtitle: {count} quick questions so we can prepare your personalized analysis.
questionnaire.successBody1: We've received your information and are already preparing a personalized analysis for
questionnaire.successBody2: . Our team will reach out within 24 hours via email at
questionnaire.q1Label: How many developers currently work on the WinDev legacy?
questionnaire.q2Label: What is the approximate size of the WinDev codebase?
questionnaire.q3Opt3: We've decided to modernize, looking for a partner
questionnaire.q3Opt4: Urgent — we have a deadline or business pressure
questionnaire.q4Label: Which pain points do you feel most with the legacy? (check all that apply)
questionnaire.q5Label: What is your role in the modernization decision?
questionnaire.q5Opt1: I'm evaluating to make a recommendation
questionnaire.q5Opt3: I am the decision-maker or co-decision-maker
questionnaire.q6Label: Have you tried to modernize the legacy before?
questionnaire.q6Opt1: No, this is the first time we're evaluating
questionnaire.q6Opt2: We evaluated options but never started
questionnaire.q6Opt3: Yes, but the project failed or was abandoned
questionnaire.q6Opt4: Yes, we have a partial migration in progress
